title: T-002 — sites table + RLS + indexes (§9.1, V-MS-01, V-MS-04)
prompt:
# T-002 — sites table + RLS + indexes

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §9.1, §9.9, §11.1 V-MS-01/V-MS-04
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce the physical `sites` table (master data, org-scoped — NOT site-scoped per §6.4 REC-L1 rule: master tables stay org_scoped). Enforce exactly-one-default-site-per-org via unique partial index (V-MS-01). Timezone column constrained at app layer to valid IANA TZ (V-MS-04).

## Implementation contract
1. New Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0041_sites.sql`:
   - CREATE TABLE sites per §9.1 DDL: id, org_id, site_code, name, is_default, legal_entity, timezone (default 'UTC'), country, data_residency_region, hierarchy_config_id, parent_site_id (self-ref FK), l3_ext_cols JSONB, active, activated_at, created_at, UNIQUE(org_id, site_code).
   - ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
   - Policy `sites_org_context` USING (org_id = app.current_org_id()) WITH CHECK (org_id = app.current_org_id()).
   - CREATE INDEX idx_sites_org ON sites(org_id) WHERE active.
   - CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sites_default ON sites(org_id) WHERE is_default = true.
   - NOTE: sites is org master data (§6.4 REC-L1) — no site_id scoping or app.current_site_id() call here; the composite (org_id, site_id) index pattern applies only to operational tables (§9.8). This table uses app.current_org_id() exclusively.
2. Drizzle schema entry `packages/db/src/schema/sites.ts` mirroring columns; export typed Insert/Select.
3. Zod schema `packages/db/src/schema/sites.zod.ts` with IANA timezone refinement via `Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone').includes(tz)`.
4. Tests assert: RLS isolation across two orgs, double-default insertion blocked, invalid IANA timezone rejected by zod, FK self-ref parent_site_id with same-org constraint (parent.org_id = child.org_id).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0041_sites.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/sites.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/sites.zod.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/sites.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given migration 0041 is applied, when \d sites is inspected, then all 14 cols are present per §9.1, RLS + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled, and unique partial index idx_sites_default exists with WHERE is_default = true.
2. Given two orgs each insert a row with is_default=true, when query is run as app_user under each org, then each sees only its own org row.
3. Given org_A already has is_default=true row, when a second insert with is_default=true and same org_id runs, then DB raises unique_violation (V-MS-01 enforced at DB level).
4. Given a row with timezone='Foo/Bar', when the zod schema parses it, then validation fails with 'invalid IANA timezone' (V-MS-04).
5. Given pg_policies for sites, when inspected, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and not current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC reads.

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/sites.test.ts asserting RLS isolation, V-MS-01 unique-violation, V-MS-04 zod refinement, pg_policies grep before migration runs.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test:integration -- sites'.

## Risk red lines
- Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use app.current_org_id() function.
- Do not add CASCADE DELETE on parent_site_id self-ref (D-MS-3: sites cannot be deleted while data exists; archive only).
- Do not site-scope this table (sites is org master data per §6.4 REC-L1; site_id column would be circular).
- Do not skip FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
- Do not put validation of IANA timezone solely in app layer — also document the CHECK constraint deferral in 14-e if/when added.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create sites table (12 cols + l3_ext_cols JSONB + active flag) + composite index idx_sites_org partial WHERE active + unique partial idx_sites_default per V-MS-01 + RLS org-scoped policy using app.current_org_id().
pipeline_inputs.details: Create sites table (12 cols + l3_ext_cols JSONB + active flag) + composite index idx_sites_org partial WHERE active + unique partial idx_sites_default per V-MS-01 + RLS org-scoped policy using app.current_org_id(). Scope: Introduce the physical `sites` table (master data, org-scoped — NOT site-scoped per §6. Touches: packages/db/migrations/0041_sites.sql, packages/db/src/schema/sites.ts, packages/db/src/schema/sites.zod.ts, packages/db/src/schema/index.ts. Constraints: 1. New Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0041_sites.sql`: - CREATE TABLE sites per §9.1 DDL: id, org_id, site_code, name, is_default, legal_entity, timezone (default 'UTC'), country, data_residency_region, hierarchy_config_id, parent_site_id (self-ref FK), l3_ext_cols JSONB, active, activated_at, created_at, UNIQUE(org_id, site_code). - ENA. Distinguished from sibling 14-multi-site tasks by its narrow schema-sites focus against PRD §9.1, §11.1 V-MS-01, §11.1 V-MS-04, §9.9. out_of_scope: Do not seed Apex/EDGE sample sites (T-005 covers seeds for hierarchy_config; activation wizard T-023 seeds the per-tenant default).

cross_module_dependencies.reason: RLS depends on app.current_org_id() helper from foundation 002-rls-baseline.sql
Cross-mod dep to 00-foundation T-125 declared (withOrgContext + app.current_org_id() per F11 rule). withSiteContext composes on top of T-125; all site-scoped tasks must carry this cross-module dep.

acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0041 is applied, when \\d sites is inspected, then all 14 cols are present per §9.1, RLS + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled, and unique partial index idx_sites_default exists with WHERE is_default = true.

Given two orgs each insert a row with is_default=true, when query is run as app_user under each org, then each sees only its own org row; AND given pg_policies for sites when inspected then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.*') GUC reads.
Given org_A already has is_default=true row, when a second insert with is_default=true and same org_id runs, then DB raises unique_violation (V-MS-01 enforced at DB level).
Given a row with timezone='Foo/Bar', when the zod schema parses it, then validation fails with 'invalid IANA timezone' (V-MS-04).
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/sites.test.ts asserting RLS isolation + V-MS-01 unique-violation + V-MS-04 zod refinement + pg_policies grep before migration runs.
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use app.current_org_id().
Do not add CASCADE DELETE on parent_site_id self-ref (D-MS-3 archive-only).
Do not site-scope sites table (master data per §6.4 REC-L1).
Do not skip FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
Do not couple zod IANA validation to a hardcoded list — use Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone').
